title: Avoid Zero as a Denominator
description: Ensure that the denominator in all division operations is non-zero to prevent ArithmeticException.
recommendation: Ensure that the denominator value in all division operations is always non-zero, or check the value against zero before performing the division.
impact: This error will crash your program in most cases.

checks.message: Ensure that the denominator value in all division operations is always non-zero, or check the value against zero before performing the division.
